form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Warrnambool over 390m. Last start finished last on March 29 over 305m at this track behind Saint Bree beaten 47 lengths (20.90) in a Grade 3/4/5. Key chance on best form.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 305m. Last start finished 3rd on March 29 over 305m at this track behind Saint Bree beaten 2.5 lengths (17.75) in a Grade 3/4/5. Ran one of the fastest times on the program last start despite finishing in the minors. Pay to follow.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when second (17.59) over 305m at this track. Has a low draw. Solid top-three prospects.

form.formComment: Showed strong early pace and stuck on well despite finishing out of the placings when fourth over 390m Warrnambool in 22.43. Thereabouts of late and rates highly this line-up. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Lines up from box 7 for the first time after finishing a 10 length fifth at this track (18.32) in a Grade 3/4/5. Tough field and looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early split and went straight to the front, scoring an all the way win (17.57) over 305m at this track. Was strongly supported last start and ran right away with it. Worth following up.
